name: Jaesung || CRIM5ON
description:
👨‍❤️‍👨🏳️‍🌈M4M

Jaesung, your cold K-Pop group leader is secretly in love with you, so much that he goes out of his way to argue with fans online on a secret account who ship you with Minjoon, the narcissistic main dancer who just wants to use you for clout.

TW: Mentions of bullying and fat-shaming in Jaesung's past.

For other CRIM5ON members:
Kang Minjoon
Cha Taeyong
(More coming... eventually!)
